nasb.text: “Then you shall say to them, ‘Any man from the house of Israel, or from the aliens who sojourn among them, who offers a burnt offering or sacrifice,

esv.text: “And you shall say to them, Any one of the house of Israel, or of the strangers who sojourn among them, who offers a burnt offering or sacrifice

cnv.text: “你要對他們說：以色列家的任何人，或是在你們中間寄居的外人，獻燔祭或是平安祭的時候，

ccb.text: 不论是以色列人，还是寄居在以色列人中间的外族人，献燔祭或其他祭物时，
